'''Cificap VIII''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Cificap system/Legends|Cificap system]]. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] freed [[Habassa]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] near that planet, before the slaves could be loaded onto the ''[[Mayhem]]''.

{{Planet-stub}}
